title: hydrangea opuloides var. belzonii
intro: Hydrangea opuloides var. belzonii, also known as Belzoni's hydrangea, is a plant species belonging to the Hydrangeaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayas and China, traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Hydrangea opuloides var. belzonii include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to make teas, poultices, and topical creams.
